landing.hero_title: Jireenya kee. Filannoo kee. Fuuldura kee.
landing.hero_subtitle: Hariiroo, fayyaa fi murtee jireenyaatiif deeggarsa maqaa malee. Bakka nageenya siif ijaarame.
landing.how_subtitle: Salphaa, nageenya qabu, fi iccitii kee eegu irratti kan xiyyeeffate.
landing.step1_desc: Maqaa hin jiru, hordoffii hin jiru. Eenyummaan kee jalqabaa kaasee guutummaatti dhokfameera.
landing.step2_desc: Ogeeyyii yaalaa fi gorsaa mirkanaa'an irraa qajeelfama amanamaa, murtii-bilisa ta'e argadhu.
landing.step3_desc: Fuuldura keetiif murtee gaarii gochuuf odeeffannoo sirrii fi aadaa waliin walqabatu fayyadami.
landing.features_subtitle: Gaaffilee gurguddoo jireenyaa qorachuuf waan siif barbaachisu hunda.
landing.anonymous_qa_desc: Sodaa murtii ykn saaxilamuu malee waan kamiyyuu gaafachuuf bakka nageenya qabu.
landing.built_for_desc: Aadaa naannootiif kabajaa gadi fagoo qabuun kan qophaa'e, iccitii kee, nageenya kee, fi fayyaa kee hunda caalaa dursa kan kennu.

login.subtitle: Seensa nageenya qabu fayyadamna, garuu eenyummaan kee dhokataadha.
login.trust_1: Maqaa kee ykn imeelii kee HIN kuusnu
login.footer: Google kan fayyadamnu dhugaa ta'uu kee mirkaneessuuf qofa. Hin adda baafamtu.

onboarding.privacy_desc: Namni eenyu akka taate hin beeku. Asitti nagaa dha.

safely.title: Seente — Nagaan
safely.subtitle: Amma maqaa malee taateerta. Namni eenyu akka taate hin beeku.

dashboard.greeting_sub: Odeeffannoo amanamaa, iccitiidhaan eegame fi qajeelfama kennuuf as jirra.
dashboard.consent_desc: Hariiroo keessatti waliin dubbachuu fayyaa fi daangaa dhaabuu irratti qajeelfama salphaa.
dashboard.contraception_desc: Maloota siif jiran fi akkamitti akka hojjetan cuunfaa.
dashboard.selfcare_desc: Har'a fayyaa miiraa kee madaaluuf yeroo fudhu.

chat.welcome_msg: Akkam! Ani Nuru dha, bakka nageenya qabu waa'ee qaama kee, hariiroo, ykn fayyaa kee waan kamiyyuu itti gaafattu. Har'a maaltu si yaaddessa?

explore.title: Qoradhu & Barri
explore.subtitle: Jireenya fayyaa qabduuf beekumsa gabaabaa.
explore.relationships_desc: Hariiroo gosa hundaa keessatti daangaa, waliin dubbachuu, fi kabajaa waliinii hubachuu.
explore.body_desc: Waa'ee fayyaa qaamaa fi kunuunsa dhuunfaa beekumsa barbaachisaa.
explore.myths_desc: Tilmaama beekamoo odeeffannoo amanamaa, yaalaan deeggarameen cabsuu.
explore.goals_desc: Kaayyoo dhuunfaa kee dhaabuuf fi galmaan ga'uuf meeshaalee fi tooftaalee.
explore.quiz_desc: Har'a waan baratte ilaaluuf qormaata ariifataa fudhu.

settings.title: Iccitii fi Qindaa'ina
settings.subtitle: Filannoo appii kee to'adhu fi daataan kee akkamitti akka qabamu bulchi.
settings.safe_desc: Waliin hojjechuun Nuru waliin guutummaatti iccitiidhaan eegama. Haasawa kee, barbaachawwan, ykn daawwannaa kiliinikaa eenyummaa dhuunfaa kee waliin hin walqabsiifnu.
settings.anonymous_notice: Appii kana keessatti maqaa malee dha
settings.save_history_desc: Haasawa kee booda ilaaluuf galmee naannoo olkaa'i.
settings.delete_data_desc: Daataa hunda hatattamaan haqi fi gara fuula baga nagaan dhuftan deebi'i.
settings.language_desc: Afaan filattu filadhu. Nuru deebii isaa ni madaqsa.
settings.logout_desc: Ba'ii fi gara fuula baga nagaan dhuftan deebi'i.

decision.intro_desc: Si qajeelchuuf gaaffilee iccitii muraasa gaafanna. Wanti hundi maqaa malee ta'a.

professionals.title: Ogeessa Barbaadi
professionals.subtitle: Ogeeyyii fayyaa fi gorsaa mirkanaa'an waliin wal qunnamaa.

events.title: Taateewwan Hawaasaa
events.subtitle: Hawaasa kee keessatti warshoppii, haasawa, fi walga'ii makadhu.

reports.title: Gabaasa Iftoominaa
reports.subtitle: Nuru hawaasa keessatti akkamitti jijjiirama fidaa akka jiru ilaali.

contact.title: Nu Quunnamaa
contact.subtitle: Garee Nuru waliin wal qunnamaa. Gargaaruuf as jirra.
contact.name: Maqaa Kee
contact.subject: Mata-duree
